description: Google Cloud Knowledge Catalog (formerly Dataplex) is a managed metadata, governance, and data discovery service for enterprise data and AI assets. It catalogs data, enriches metadata, supports search and lineage, and provides agent-oriented context retrieval tools.
summary: Dataplex exposes a REST API at `https://dataplex.googleapis.com`, a public MCP endpoint at `https://dataplex.googleapis.com/mcp`, and a `gcloud dataplex` CLI surface.
